name: ImageServlet
description: ImageServlet is a Servlet class for handling image-related requests, typically responsible for receiving HTTP requests and returning image data.

name: Customer
description: Customer class is used to represent customer entities in the system, encapsulating customer basic information and related behaviors. As a core component of the business model, this class assumes responsibility for customer data storage and management in the system.

name: AccountBean
description: AccountBean is a data carrier class for encapsulating account-related information, typically used in the system as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) or model class, providing access and operation interfaces for account data.

name: SuppliersBean
description: SuppliersBean is a data model class for encapsulating supplier-related information, typically used in the system as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) or entity class for representing and managing supplier data.

name: PopulateDBBean
description: PopulateDBBean is an auxiliary class for initializing or populating database data, typically used during system startup or testing phases, responsible for loading predefined data into the database.

name: ShoppingCartBean
description: ShoppingCartBean is a Java Bean class for representing shopping cart data, typically used to encapsulate shopping cart-related properties and states, facilitating the transmission and persistence of shopping cart information between application layers.

name: Util
description: Util class is a general utility class providing static methods to support common auxiliary functions in the system. Since no specific methods are currently defined, its responsibilities may cover general utility functions such as string processing, collection operations, date formatting, etc.

name: ShoppingBean
description: ShoppingBean is a Java Bean class for encapsulating shopping-related data, typically used in Web applications as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for passing shopping cart or product information between different layers.

name: BackOrder
description: BackOrder class is used to represent and manage back orders, i.e., delayed delivery orders generated when product inventory is insufficient. This class in the system is responsible for tracking and processing order information that cannot be satisfied in a timely manner.

name: ListProperties
description: ListProperties is a class for encapsulating or managing list-type properties, possibly used as a data structure or configuration container in the system.

name: EMailMessage
description: EMailMessage class is used to represent email messages, encapsulating basic email information and content.

name: Inventory
description: Inventory class is used to manage and maintain inventory information, providing basic operations and access functions for inventory data.

name: Order
description: Order class is used to represent and manage order information, serving as the core entity class for processing order-related business in the system.

name: ShoppingItem
description: ShoppingItem class is used to represent shopping items, typically containing product information and its related attributes, serving as a basic data unit in the shopping system.

name: CustomerMgr
description: CustomerMgr is a class for managing customer-related operations, responsible for coordinating customer data processing and business logic.

name: CatalogMgr
description: CatalogMgr is a class for managing catalog-related operations, responsible for coordinating and processing functions related to catalog structure, content, or metadata. In the system, it typically serves as the core component for catalog management, providing capabilities for organizing, querying, or maintaining catalogs.

name: ResetDBBean
description: ResetDBBean is a Java Bean class for encapsulating database reset-related operations, typically used in system initialization or testing scenarios to trigger database state resets.

name: MailerAppException
description: MailerAppException is an exception class for representing specific exception situations in email applications, encapsulating error information related to email sending or processing.

name: ProductBean
description: ProductBean is a Java Bean class for encapsulating product-related data, typically serving as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for passing product information between system layers.

name: HelpBean
description: HelpBean is a placeholder class with no specific functionality defined, currently containing no methods, possibly for future extension or as a data carrier.

name: OrderItem
description: OrderItem class represents a single product item in an order, used to encapsulate product-related information (such as product ID, quantity, price, etc.), serving as a basic composition unit for order details in the order system.

name: Supplier
description: Supplier class is used to represent supplier entities, typically serving as a data model in the system for storing and managing supplier-related information.

name: MailerBean
description: MailerBean is a Java Bean class for encapsulating email sending functionality, typically responsible in enterprise applications for handling email-related configurations and operations.

name: OrderInfo
description: OrderInfo class is used to represent basic order information, serving as a carrier for order data transmission and storage in the system.

name: LoginInfo
description: LoginInfo class is used to encapsulate user login-related information, serving as a data carrier for transmitting or storing login status and credentials in the system.
